violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Rice at 90F.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Shrimp at 50F.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Was at +400. Recommend 150-400
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
